title: 7 Soothing Herbal Teas to Help Older Adults with Dark Lips
description: Sambucus nigra teas, also known as elderflower tea, has been used for centuries to help with dark lips. The tea contains properties like flavonoids, anthocyanins, and quercetin, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. These properties help to reduce melanin production, the pigment responsible for dark skin and lips. The flavonoids and anthocyanins also have a brightening effect, which can help to lighten dark lips over time. To use Sambucus nigra tea for dark lips, make a...
